propositions: Rename the directory examples/claude-skills/ to examples/agent-skills/ and remove all stale path references.
De-brand the README to state SKILL.md is a cross-provider open standard and note where each harness reads skills, dropping Claude-only framing.
Replace Claude-Code-specific phrasing such as 'the Task tool' with provider-neutral wording in skill bodies.
Repoint internal references from CLAUDE.md/CLAUDE.local.md to AGENTS.md in skill bodies.
Update the shared-sync test (SKILLS_DIR) to the new path so make test stays green.
Keep each SKILL.md's name/description frontmatter as the portable core.
